title: More Readable Settings
description: Makes settings more readable using colors. Supports 99% of the languages in the game
body:
# More Readable Settings

[![Unique Dark Refined on Modrinth](https://github.com/AmongstReality/amongstrealitys-badges/blob/main/compact/modrinth@2x.png?raw=true)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/more-readable-settings)
[![Unique Dark Refined on CurseForge](https://github.com/AmongstReality/amongstrealitys-badges/blob/main/compact/curseforge@2x.png?raw=true)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/more-readable-settings)
[![amongstreality on Patreon](https://github.com/AmongstReality/amongstrealitys-badges/blob/main/compact/patreon@2x.png?raw=true)](https://www.patreon.com/c/AmongstReality)
[![amongstreality on Buy Me a Coffee](https://github.com/AmongstReality/amongstrealitys-badges/blob/main/compact/bmc@2x.png?raw=true)](https://buymeacoffee.com/amongstreality)

This resource pack's purpose is to make settings a bit more readable by adding some colors to them.

## Language support

Supports almost every language in the game

## Preview

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XQ7UVQw3/images/106176c34465e164d2e7869a7b38e2a94fa2b82d.png)
